text:
This PR adds a single new file with three new declarations. Nothing existing is renamed, removed, restated, or weakened, and there is no Mathlib bump involved.

From the deprecation / backward-compatibility angle there is nothing to flag: no public API is touched, so no aliases are required. The substantive issues here (the tautological `curvature_gauge_transformation`, the `oriented : True` no-op field, the thin `banach_steinhaus` wrapper) fall under other reviewers' angles.

TAUCETI-VERDICT-0ed93f1464957b8d2f33e16e

```json
{
  "verdict": "approve",
  "summary": "Purely additive PR introducing one new file; no existing public declaration is renamed, removed, or weakened, and there is no Mathlib bump. Nothing to flag on the deprecation/backward-compatibility angle.",
  "findings": []
}
```

verdict_obj.summary: Purely additive PR introducing one new file; no existing public declaration is renamed, removed, or weakened, and there is no Mathlib bump. Nothing to flag on the deprecation/backward-compatibility angle.
